things.name: Angel of the North
things.description: Antony Gormley's iconic 20m steel sculpture with a 54m wingspan on the A1 hillside

things.name: Newcastle Castle
things.description: Norman 'New Castle' keep that gave the city its name, with views over the Tyne bridges

things.name: BALTIC Centre for Contemporary Art
things.description: Major contemporary art gallery in a converted Gateshead flour mill on the Tyne

things.name: Sage Gateshead
things.description: Norman Foster's iconic curved glass music venue on the south bank of the Tyne

things.name: Discovery Museum
things.description: Free museum covering Newcastle's industrial and scientific history - Turbinia ship included

things.name: Hadrian's Wall
things.description: UNESCO World Heritage Roman frontier wall - day trip to Housesteads and Vindolanda forts

things.name: The Quayside
things.description: Vibrant riverside regeneration area with bars, restaurants and the Millennium and Tyne bridges

things.name: Laing Art Gallery
things.description: Free gallery of fine and decorative arts with a strong collection of Newcastle silverware

things.name: St James' Park
things.description: Iconic home of Newcastle United - the 3rd largest stadium in England

things.name: Beamish Open Air Museum
things.description: Living museum of the Great North recreating 1820s and 1900s Northern England
